retry_reason: Not a wrapper — refcount operation (kfree_skb) is just cleanup, not the function's purpose.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to set up a beacon template for an AP vif. It performs many operations (checking vdev type, obtaining link conf, handling EMA, setting IEs, P2P IE, calling WMI) and uses kfree_skb only as cleanup for an internally allocated skb. The refcount management is incidental, not the main goal.
